title: Technology Risk Assessment Checklist
description: Step-by-step checklist for conducting technology risk assessments under BNM RMiT

items.item: Confirm scope of assessment (systems, processes, business units)
Review previous risk assessment findings and open items
Identify assessment team and assign roles
Gather current IT asset inventory and system architecture diagrams
Identify threat sources (external, internal, environmental)
Map vulnerabilities in current technology environment
Review recent incidents, near-misses, and audit findings
Assess third-party and outsourcing risks
Evaluate emerging technology risks (cloud, AI/ML, APIs)
Score each risk using likelihood x impact matrix
Determine inherent risk before controls
Evaluate effectiveness of existing controls
Calculate residual risk after controls
Select treatment option for each risk above appetite
Develop treatment plans with timelines and owners
Obtain CTRO/Board approval for risk acceptances
Document findings in technology risk register
Report to Board Risk Committee
Schedule quarterly risk review
Update BNM if material risk changes occur
